challenge: A checked-in SQL schema was being tracked as portability progress even though no executable NodeKit runtime implemented or proved the full Caseflow contract.
observedFailure: The PostgreSQL layer lacked cases, runs, approvals, exceptions, receipts, owner-scoped runtime methods, public package exports, TypeScript declarations, and live provider conformance.
resolution: NodeKit now ships a driver-neutral PostgreSQL Caseflow adapter, complete transactional schema, owner-scoped operations, stable public and typed exports, a disposable-provider conformance runner, and a complete Supabase RLS projection over the portable tables.
knownLimitations: The Supabase SQL projection has not yet passed authenticated live Auth, Storage, Realtime, Queue, and Cron conformance.
PostgreSQL subscriptions use polling and durable jobs remain an external runtime capability by design.
